components.name: InsightsSummaryComponent
LandingComponent
components.templateData:
ChessRoot

Discover hidden achievements in your chess games. Analyze your play, track rare milestones, and explore deep insights about your chess journey.

explore Explorer bar_chart Insights emoji_events Achievements
explore

Opening Explorer

Explore your personal opening repertoire on an interactive board. Browse your games move by move, see statistics for each position, and compare your play to master-level opening books.

Explore → emoji_events

Achievements

Scan thousands of games for 50+ rare ChessRoot — from smothered mates to pawn checkmates, castle forks, and alphabet openings.

Explore Achievements → bar_chart

Insights

Visualize your most played openings, win rates by color and time control, top opponents, and other stats — just like Lichess insights.

View Insights → login

Lichess Login

Log in with your Lichess account for faster game downloads and higher API rate limits. Your token stays safely in your browser.

@if (auth.isLoggedIn()) { check_circle {{ auth.getUsername() }} } @else { }

variables.name: ACHIEVEMENT_CATEGORIES
variables.defaultValue:
{
  proud: 'Make Eric Proud',
  pawn: 'Pawn Structures',
  piece: 'Piece Structures',
  alphabet: 'Alphabet Openings',
  checkmate: 'Checkmates',
  funny: "There's a Funny Line",

SPEED_OPTIONS

variables.defaultValue:

  ultraBullet: { label: 'Ultrabullet' },
  bullet: { label: 'Bullet' },

  rapid: { label: 'Rapid' },
  classical: { label: 'Classical' },

} as const

variables.name: UserActions
userDataReducer
variables.defaultValue:
createReducer(
  initialUserDataState,
  on(UserActions.updatePlatform, (state, { platform }) => ({ ...state, platform })),
  on(UserActions.updatePlayerColor, (state, { playerColor }) => ({ ...state, playerColor })),
  on(UserActions.updateFromDate, (state, { fromDate }) => ({ ...state, fromDate })),
  on(UserActions.updateToDate, (state, { toDate }) => ({ ...state, toDate })),
  on(UserActions.updateTimeControls, (state, { timeControls }) => ({ ...state, timeControls })),
)

src/app/state/reducers/user-data.reducer.name: userDataReducer
src/app/state/reducers/user-data.reducer.defaultValue:
createReducer(
  initialUserDataState,
  on(UserActions.updatePlatform, (state, { platform }) => ({ ...state, platform })),
  on(UserActions.updatePlayerColor, (state, { playerColor }) => ({ ...state, playerColor })),
  on(UserActions.updateFromDate, (state, { fromDate }) => ({ ...state, fromDate })),
  on(UserActions.updateToDate, (state, { toDate }) => ({ ...state, toDate })),
  on(UserActions.updateTimeControls, (state, { timeControls }) => ({ ...state, timeControls })),
)
